title: CVE-2024-3094 in liblzma
description: Base image includes a vulnerable version of liblzma (xz-utils backdoor). CVSS 10.0.

title: CVE-2023-44487 in ingress-nginx
description: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset vulnerability present in the ingress controller image.

title: CVE-2022-0185 in kernel headers
description: Container base image bundles vulnerable kernel headers package. Not confirmed exploitable at runtime.

title: CVE-2023-5678 in openssl
description: Vulnerable OpenSSL version detected in image layer. No known active exploitation.

title: Privileged container configuration
description: Pod spec runs with privileged: true. Flagged by static policy scan.

title: CVE-2021-3712 in openssl (legacy layer)
description: Older vulnerable layer detected but superseded by later image layer. Low confidence.
